findings.title: Supply Chain CVE: GHSA-2p9h-rqjw-gm92 in n8n@2.8.3
findings.recommendation: Upgrade n8n to a version that resolves GHSA-2p9h-rqjw-gm92. Check https://osv.dev/vulnerability/GHSA-2p9h-rqjw-gm92 for patched versions. Enable Dependabot or OSV-Scanner in CI to catch future CVEs automatically.
